creator: ttmtko@gmail.com
text:
tgif-4.2.5 cannot generate Japanese characters in EPS file properly.  Official patch has been released.

Fix: 

Please incorporate the official patch on tgif-4.25.

Announcement of this bug at official site of tgif.
http://bourbon.usc.edu/tgif/download.html#tgif-QPL-4.2.5b

patch file is here:
ftp://bourbon.usc.edu/pub/tgif/patches/tgif-QPL-4.2-patch5b.gz
How-To-Repeat: currently ports.
